mapper.sql: id, user_id, content, visibility, media_ids_json, topic_codes_json, location, related_recipe_id, source_type, status, reject_reason, block_reason, block_action, like_count, favorite_count, comment_count, published_at, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at

p.id, p.user_id, p.content, p.visibility, p.media_ids_json, p.topic_codes_json, p.location, p.related_recipe_id, p.source_type, p.status, p.reject_reason, p.block_reason, p.block_action, p.like_count, p.favorite_count, p.comment_count, p.published_at, p.created_at, p.updated_at, p.deleted_at, u.nickname, u.avatar_url, rv.title as related_recipe_title, rr.category_code as related_recipe_category_code
mapper.select: select from cook_posts p inner join cook_users u on u.id = p.user_id and u.deleted_at is null left join cook_recipes rr on rr.id = p.related_recipe_id and rr.deleted_at is null left join cook_recipe_versions rv on rv.id = rr.current_version_id and rv.deleted_at is null where p.id = #{id} and p.deleted_at is null limit 1

select from cook_posts p inner join cook_users u on u.id = p.user_id and u.deleted_at is null left join cook_recipes rr on rr.id = p.related_recipe_id and rr.deleted_at is null left join cook_recipe_versions rv on rv.id = rr.current_version_id and rv.deleted_at is null where p.id = #{id} and p.deleted_at is null limit 1 for update

select from cook_posts p inner join cook_users u on u.id = p.user_id and u.deleted_at is null left join cook_recipes rr on rr.id = p.related_recipe_id and rr.deleted_at is null left join cook_recipe_versions rv on rv.id = rr.current_version_id and rv.deleted_at is null where p.deleted_at is null and p.status = 'published' and p.visibility = 'public'
and p.topic_codes_json like concat('%"', #{topicCode}, '"%')
and (p.content like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or u.nickname like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
and rr.category_code = #{recipeCategoryCode}
and (rr.category_code is null or rr.category_code not in
#{code} )
order by
case when rr.category_code in
#{code}
then 0 else 1 end,
p.published_at desc, p.id desc

select from cook_posts p inner join cook_users u on u.id = p.user_id and u.deleted_at is null left join cook_recipes rr on rr.id = p.related_recipe_id and rr.deleted_at is null left join cook_recipe_versions rv on rv.id = rr.current_version_id and rv.deleted_at is null where p.deleted_at is null
and p.status = #{status}
and (p.content like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or u.nickname like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
order by p.updated_at desc, p.id desc
mapper.update: update cook_posts set content = #{content}, visibility = #{visibility}, media_ids_json = #{mediaIdsJson}, topic_codes_json = #{topicCodesJson}, location = #{location}, related_recipe_id = #{relatedRecipeId}, source_type = #{sourceType}, status = #{status}, reject_reason = #{rejectReason}, block_reason = #{blockReason}, block_action = #{blockAction}, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id} and deleted_at is null
update cook_posts set status = #{status}, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id} and deleted_at is null

update cook_posts set status = 'published', reject_reason = null, block_reason = null, block_action = null, published_at = current_timestamp, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id} and deleted_at is null
update cook_posts set status = 'blocked', block_reason = #{reason}, block_action = #{action}, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id} and deleted_at is null

update cook_posts set status = 'published', block_reason = null, block_action = null, published_at = coalesce(published_at, current_timestamp), updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id} and deleted_at is null
update cook_posts set deleted_at = current_timestamp, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id} and deleted_at is null

update cook_posts
like_count = like_count + 1, favorite_count = favorite_count + 1, comment_count = comment_count + 1,
updated_at = current_timestamp
where id = #{id} and deleted_at is null

update cook_posts
like_count = greatest(like_count - 1, 0), favorite_count = greatest(favorite_count - 1, 0), comment_count = greatest(comment_count - 1, 0),
updated_at = current_timestamp
where id = #{id} and deleted_at is null
